title: Friends.
content:
Are friends delight or pain?
    Could bounty but remain
    Riches were good.

    But if they only stay
    Bolder to fly away,
    Riches are sad.
meaning:
"Friends." is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
